top_signals.title: UBS' Falconio Pushes Out Expectations for Fed Rate Cut
top_signals.summary: UBS Head of Taxable Fixed Income Strategy Leslie Falconio says pressure on the Fed to hike rates is easing now that the US and Iran have reached a deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz. She has now pushed out her call for a rate cut in 2027.  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Shippers and Oil Giants Seek Clarity on US-Iran Peace Deal
top_signals.summary: A US-Iran deal intended to reopen the Strait of Hormuz within days left many of the world’s top shipowners, traders and oil producer nations seeking clarity about the terms of the pact that’s pivotal to the global economy.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: ‘Crypto spring’ is here, says one analyst after bitcoin's key signals turn bullish
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Foxconn, Schneider Electric team up in AI data center equipment
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Hackathon Spotlights AI, Autonomous Systems for Maritime Security
top_signals.summary: Fincantieri has wrapped up its inaugural Maritime Security Hackathon, awarding top honors to startup Lares Technologies for a solution designed to coordinate manned and unmanned maritime assets across multiple operational domains, underscoring…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bureau Veritas Appoints New Leaders for Marine & Offshore for Asia Pacific, Greater China
top_signals.summary: Bureau Veritas Marine & Offshore (BV) has announced the appointment of Dr. Jeffrey Guo as Senior Vice President, Asia Pacific, and Maciej Lepicki as Vice President, Greater China, effective June 1, 2026.As Senior Vice President for Asia Pacific…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
